case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. JAMES CREIGHTON HARVEY

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEY, JAMES CREIGHTON (SBN 91239) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARVEY, JAMES CREIGHTON (SBN 91239) $2,717.20 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,897.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
